mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_stage (tournament_id, name, team_count, direct_advance, indirect_advance, round_type) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{name}, #{teamCount}, #{directAdvance}, #{indirectAdvance}, #{roundType})

INSERT INTO group_stage (tournament_id, name, team_count, direct_advance, indirect_advance, round_type) VALUES
(#{item.tournamentId}, #{item.name}, #{item.teamCount}, #{item.directAdvance}, #{item.indirectAdvance}, #{item.roundType})
